name: PT Karya Bersama Anugerah Tbk
summary: PT Karya Bersama Anugerah Tbk engages in the real estate development business. It constructs Rusunami dwellings, landed houses, and shop-houses. The company was founded in 2014 and is headquartered in Balikpapan, Indonesia. PT Karya Bersama Anugerah Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Visi Kota Indonesia.
